---
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    tbl-cap-location: top
editor: source
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source(here::here("common.R"))

scores[, learner_id := factor(learner_id, levels = rev(lrntab$id))]
```

Scores from the outer evaluation folds per dataset and model, see `scores.[csv|rds]`.

## Score Plots

```{r scores-all-tasks, results='asis'}
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 16

tune_eval_combos = list(
  list(tune = "harrell_c", evals = msr_tbl[type == "Discrimination" & !erv, id]),
  list(tune = "isbs", evals = msr_tbl[type == "Scoring Rule" & !erv, id])
)

cat("::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")

for (combo in tune_eval_combos) {
  tune_id = combo$tune
  tune_label = msr_tbl[id == tune_id, label]

  for (measure_id in combo$evals) {
    measure_label = msr_tbl[id == measure_id, label]

    for (color_var in c("learner_group", "learner_hspace")) {
      color_label = if (color_var == "learner_group") "Group" else "Hypothesis Space"
      cat("###", paste0(measure_label, " / ", tune_label, " / ", color_label), "\n\n")

      p = plot_scores(
        scores,
        type = "box",
        eval_measure_id = measure_id,
        tuning_measure_id = tune_id,
        dodge = FALSE,
        flip = TRUE,
        ncol = 5,
        color_var = color_var,
        msr_tbl = msr_tbl,
        tasktab = tasktab
      )
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n")
    }
  }
}

cat(":::\n\n")
```

## Scores by Dataset

```{r scores-by-task, results='asis'}
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 6

task_ids = sort(unique(scores$task_id))

tune_eval_combos = list(
  list(tune = "harrell_c", evals = msr_tbl[type == "Discrimination" & !erv, id]),
  list(tune = "isbs", evals = msr_tbl[type == "Scoring Rule" & !erv, id])
)

for (tid in task_ids) {
  cat("\n\n### ", tid, "\n\n")
  cat("::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")

  for (combo in tune_eval_combos) {
    tune_id = combo$tune
    tune_label = msr_tbl[id == tune_id, label]

    for (measure_id in combo$evals) {
      measure_label = msr_tbl[id == measure_id, label]

      cat("####", paste0(measure_label, " (tuned: ", tune_label, ")"), "\n\n")

      for (color_var in c("learner_group", "learner_hspace")) {
        p = plot_scores(
          scores[task_id == tid],
          type = "box",
          eval_measure_id = measure_id,
          tuning_measure_id = tune_id,
          dodge = FALSE,
          flip = TRUE,
          ncol = 1,
          color_var = color_var,
          msr_tbl = msr_tbl,
          tasktab = tasktab
        )
        print(p)
        cat("\n\n")
      }
    }
  }

  cat(":::\n\n")
}
```
